title: fraxinus americana var. rubicunda
intro: Fraxinus americana var. rubicunda is a variety of the American white ash tree, known for its distinctive red or reddish-brown bark. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, making it useful for treating wounds and skin conditions. The health benefits of Fraxinus americana var. rubicunda include reducing fever, relieving pain, and soothing digestive issues, as well as providing antioxidant and antimicrobial effects. Herbal preparations of the plant typically involve making a decoction or infusion from the bark, leaves, or roots, which can be used to treat a variety of ailments.
